title: linux: add check for sysctl before using it
body:
check that the sysctl we'd like to use is supported by the kernel
before using it.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1618

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
`./run_linux.go:1460:36: undefined: strings.ReplaceAll`

Has `ReplaceAll()` been added with go 1.12?

Oh yes, that's a fairly new function (see https://go-review.googlesource.com/c/go/+/137855/). @giuseppe, can you change to use [Replace](https://golang.org/pkg/strings/#Replace) to remain backwards compatible?
@vrothberg sure, I had pushed a fixed version and was waiting for the CI to complete

:pushpin: Commit 2ec064f has been approved by `rhatdan`
